fields.name: logo
fields.label: Logo
fields.description: Your logo image, shown in the header and footer.

fields.name: logoAlt
fields.label: Logo — describe this photo
fields.description: One short sentence describing what's in the photo, as if telling a friend on the phone (e.g. “A mom holding her baby in evening light”). This helps people who can't see the photo, and helps Google.

fields.name: footerTagline
fields.label: Short line under the logo in the footer

fields.name: phone
fields.label: Phone number
fields.description: Shown exactly as you type it, e.g. (509) 948-7322.

fields.name: serviceAreas
fields.label: Cities you serve
fields.description: Shown in the footer, separated by dots (e.g. Richland · Kennewick · Pasco). 2 to 5 cities.

fields.name: googleProfile
fields.label: Google reviews link
fields.description: Where the “five-star reviews on Google” line sends people.

fields.name: seoImage
fields.label: Sharing photo
fields.description: The photo shown when someone shares your site on Facebook, iMessage, etc. A wide horizontal photo works best.

fields.name: seoImageAlt
fields.label: Sharing photo — describe this photo
fields.description: One short sentence describing what's in the photo, as if telling a friend on the phone (e.g. “A mom holding her baby in evening light”). This helps people who can't see the photo, and helps Google.

fields.name: advanced
fields.label: Search engine info (set up by your web team — safe to ignore)

fields.name: siteUrl
fields.label: Website address
fields.description: Leave as is unless the domain changes.

fields.name: seo
fields.label: Google search listing
fields.description: How your page appears in Google search results.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title in Google results
fields.description: The blue headline in Google. Best kept under 60 characters so it doesn't get cut off.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description in Google results
fields.description: The grey text under the headline in Google. Best kept between 120 and 155 characters.

fields.name: visible
fields.label: Show this section on the site
fields.description: Turn this off to temporarily hide the whole section.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Photo
fields.description: The large photo at the very top of the page. A wide horizontal photo works best.

fields.name: imageAlt
fields.label: Photo — describe this photo
fields.description: One short sentence describing what's in the photo, as if telling a friend on the phone (e.g. “A mom holding her baby in evening light”). This helps people who can't see the photo, and helps Google.

fields.name: scriptLine
fields.label: Handwritten-style line
fields.description: The short cursive line under the headline.

fields.name: visible
fields.label: Show this section on the site
fields.description: Turn this off to temporarily hide the whole section.

fields.name: scriptLine
fields.label: Handwritten-style line next to the photos

fields.name: rearImage
fields.label: Back photo
fields.description: The arched photo that sits behind. A vertical photo works best.

fields.name: rearImageAlt
fields.label: Back photo — describe this photo
fields.description: One short sentence describing what's in the photo, as if telling a friend on the phone (e.g. “A mom holding her baby in evening light”). This helps people who can't see the photo, and helps Google.

fields.name: frontImage
fields.label: Front photo
fields.description: The photo that overlaps in front. A vertical photo works best.

fields.name: frontImageAlt
fields.label: Front photo — describe this photo
fields.description: One short sentence describing what's in the photo, as if telling a friend on the phone (e.g. “A mom holding her baby in evening light”). This helps people who can't see the photo, and helps Google.

fields.name: visible
fields.label: Show this section on the site
fields.description: Turn this off to temporarily hide the whole section.

fields.name: label
fields.label: Name on the card (also appears in the top menu)

fields.name: image
fields.label: Photo
fields.description: A vertical photo works best for these cards.

fields.name: imageAlt
fields.label: Photo — describe this photo
fields.description: One short sentence describing what's in the photo, as if telling a friend on the phone (e.g. “A mom holding her baby in evening light”). This helps people who can't see the photo, and helps Google.

fields.name: link
fields.label: Where the card goes
fields.description: Leave as #inquire so the card opens the planner. Your web team can change this if needed.

fields.name: prefill
fields.label: Planner choice to pre-select
fields.description: When someone clicks this card, the planner opens with this session type already chosen. Must match one of the choices in the planner's first question exactly (e.g. Senior, Family, Couple, Newborn).

fields.name: photoBreak
fields.label: Wide photo with a cursive phrase

fields.name: visible
fields.label: Show this section on the site
fields.description: Turn this off to temporarily hide the whole section.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Photo
fields.description: The full-width photo between sections. A wide horizontal photo works best.

fields.name: imageAlt
fields.label: Photo — describe this photo
fields.description: One short sentence describing what's in the photo, as if telling a friend on the phone (e.g. “A mom holding her baby in evening light”). This helps people who can't see the photo, and helps Google.

fields.name: srHeading
fields.label: Hidden title for screen readers
fields.description: Not shown on screen — read aloud by screen readers and seen by Google. A plain description of the photo section.

fields.name: visible
fields.label: Show this section on the site
fields.description: Turn this off to temporarily hide the whole section.

fields.name: portrait
fields.label: Your portrait
fields.description: A vertical photo of you works best.

fields.name: portraitAlt
fields.label: Your portrait — describe this photo
fields.description: One short sentence describing what's in the photo, as if telling a friend on the phone (e.g. “A mom holding her baby in evening light”). This helps people who can't see the photo, and helps Google.

fields.name: howItWorks
fields.label: How a session works (the four steps)

fields.name: visible
fields.label: Show this section on the site
fields.description: Turn this off to temporarily hide the whole section.

fields.name: steps
fields.label: The four steps
fields.description: The design fits exactly four steps.

fields.name: kindWords
fields.label: Kind words (reviews section)
fields.description: The quotes themselves live under “Kind Words (Testimonials)” in the menu on the left.

fields.name: visible
fields.label: Show this section on the site
fields.description: Turn this off to temporarily hide the whole section.

fields.name: reviewsLine
fields.label: Google reviews line
fields.description: e.g. “96 five-star reviews on Google” — update the number as reviews grow.

fields.name: visible
fields.label: Show this section on the site
fields.description: Turn this off to temporarily hide the whole section.

fields.name: backgroundImage
fields.label: Background photo
fields.description: The photo behind the invitation. A wide horizontal photo works best.

fields.name: backgroundImageAlt
fields.label: Background photo — describe this photo
fields.description: One short sentence describing what's in the photo, as if telling a friend on the phone (e.g. “A mom holding her baby in evening light”). This helps people who can't see the photo, and helps Google.

fields.name: options
fields.label: Photo choices
fields.description: The design fits exactly five choices.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Photo
fields.description: A small photo shown on the choice card.

fields.name: options
fields.label: Photo choices
fields.description: The design fits exactly five choices.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Photo
fields.description: A small photo shown on the choice card.

fields.name: options
fields.label: Choices
fields.description: The design fits exactly three choices.

fields.name: value
fields.label: What Lisa sees in the inquiry
fields.description: The wording saved with the inquiry. Usually the same as the title.

fields.name: placeholder
fields.label: Grey hint text inside the box

fields.name: message
fields.label: Message
fields.description: Your phone number is added automatically after this message.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Photo next to the message
fields.description: A vertical photo works best.

fields.name: order
fields.label: Page order
fields.description: Controls where this page appears in the journal. Use each number once.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Page title (optional)
fields.description: A short handwritten-style heading for this page.

fields.name: tapeStyle
fields.label: Tape preset
fields.description: Choose one of the approved tape treatments. The colors and styling stay locked to the site design.

fields.name: layout
fields.label: Photo layout preset
fields.description: Choose an approved arrangement. Photo positions, spacing and decoration are handled automatically.

fields.name: photos
fields.label: Photos
fields.description: Add between two and four photographs to this page.

fields.name: alt
fields.label: Describe this photo
fields.description: One specific sentence describing the people, setting and moment for visitors who cannot see the image.

fields.name: quote
fields.label: The quote
fields.description: One or two short sentences in the client's words.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Who said it
fields.description: A first name (e.g. “Sarah”) or a group (e.g. “Families often mention”).

fields.name: sessionType
fields.label: Session type or theme
fields.description: Shown after the name, e.g. “senior session” or “patience”.

fields.name: featured
fields.label: Show on the homepage
fields.description: The homepage shows the first three kind words that have this turned on.

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
